text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today marks the third race of the Classics and the
decider of whether Teio can become a Triple
Crown champion—the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All my fans are watching me. They're all waiting to
see if I can nab the Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew... I wonder if this is how Prez felt.
choice_data_list: I'm sure she was so scared she cried.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What?! Prez is never scared and she never ever
cries!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'm sure it was a breeze for her! Like, whoosh and it was over!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Right. I gotta pull myself together too.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna be the Monarch who surpasses even the
Emperor, after all!
choice_data_list: Come back a Triple Crown champion!
Come back a Triple Crown champion!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Here I go! The star of this race is none
other than me, the great and mighty Teio!
